mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO tbl_board (title, content, writer) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id, title, content, writer, b.created_at, b.updated_at, file_id, file_name, uuid, sort_order, image FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_board_file f ON b.board_id = f.board_id WHERE b.board_id = #{boardId} AND b.deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_board SET deleted = TRUE, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE tbl_board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted = FALSE

if.test: types != null and types != '' and keyword != null and keyword != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board b
WHERE deleted = FALSE

SELECT b.board_id, title, b.writer, b.created_at, count(comment_id) AS commentCount, file_name, uuid FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_comment c ON b.board_id = c.board_id LEFT JOIN tbl_board_file f ON b.board_id = f.board_id and sort_order = 0 WHERE b.deleted = FALSE
GROUP BY b.board_id ORDER BY b.board_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert:
insert into tbl_board_file(board_id, file_name, uuid, sort_order, image) values
(#{boardId}, #{file.fileName}, #{file.uuid}, #{file.sortOrder}, #{file.image})
